scores.rationale: Directly serves the first-time purpose-recognition and note-capture journey described by the candidate.
The landing promise, capture action, and saved-state behavior form a consistent two-screen path.
Screen summaries, required states, mobile rules, acceptance criteria, and recovery behavior are actionable.
The adaptation clearly rejects proprietary identity while re-authoring the product and interaction language.
Keyboard operation, non-color confirmation, focus order, draft preservation, and retry behavior are covered.
Unspecified choices are labeled as assumptions and the brief-only grounding boundary is not overstated.
